text: As I stand here in this brightly-lit, almost sterile space, I find myself drawn toward the glass doors and the vibrant display beyond. The world outside seems muted compared to the intrigue promised within—"R + D" in bold letters beckons me. I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity, as if I'm on the verge of crossing a threshold into a space of possibility and reflection. I am eager to explore what human innovation and connection mean in this very moment.
